message.content: are there any skills that you can use which i defined?

content.text:
Looking at the available skills listed in the system, these are the built-in skills — none are user-defined:

- **update-config** — configure Claude Code settings/hooks
- **keybindings-help** — customize keyboard shortcuts
- **simplify** — review and improve changed code
- **loop** — run recurring tasks on an interval
- **claude-api** — build apps with the Claude/Anthropic SDK

You haven't defined any custom skills. If you'd like to create one, you can add skill files to your Claude Code configuration. Would you like help setting that up?

lastPrompt: are there any skills that you can use which i defined?
